goal: Implement the claude.ai/design 'MeowTarot Desktop' doc's Card Meaning screen — the desktop-view (≥1024px) for the /cards/* tarot-card-meaning pages (home + widget desktop already shipped earlier; this is the remaining 'not just home page' screen).
done: Added a single additive @media (min-width:1024px) block in css/styles.css (after the existing meanings desktop tweak) anchored to body[data-page='meanings'] .tarot-card-meaning-page. Widens the page to min(1180px, 100vw-80px) and turns <article> into a 336px + 1fr grid: .card-meaning-hero is set to display:contents so its two children place into the grid directly — .card-visual becomes a sticky (top:96px) left rail spanning all rows, .card-meta (eyebrow/title/alias/archetype/summary/orientation-toggle) and every section/footer/.card-discover flow in the right column. Title bumped to 60px, hero .card-frame widened to 296px, #keywordSection turned into a 2-col grid so Light & Shadow sit side-by-side, footer pills given more padding. Pure CSS, zero markup change, so all 78 EN + 78 TH generated pages + future regenerations are covered with no regeneration, and i18n stays in JS. Honest adaptation: the design's third 'related cards' sticky rail was NOT fabricated (the DOM carries no related-card data) — the existing JS-injected .card-discover links + next-card footer serve that intent in-flow.
verified: Headless Chrome 1440px on /cards/the-fool/ (EN) and /th/cards/the-fool/ (TH): both reflow to sticky-art-left + content-right, keywords side-by-side, Draw-this-energy CTA + discover links + footer pills render in the right column. 390px mobile render byte-identical to before (all rules gated behind ≥1024px). Index page /tarot-card-meanings/ untouched (selectors anchored to .tarot-card-meaning-page, which only detail pages carry).
